allow: PowerShell(pwd; ls -Force 2>$null; if \(-not \(Test-Path .\)\) { Write-Output 'dir does not exist' })

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); from app import db; ctx = app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); from app import models; db.create_all\(\); from app.models import Player, Game; [db.session.add\(Player\(name=n\)\) for n in ['Marcos','Capo1','Capo2'] if not Player.query.filter_by\(name=n\).first\(\)]; [db.session.add\(Game\(name=n\)\) for n in ['CS2','Valorant','League of Legends','Fortnite'] if not Game.query.filter_by\(name=n\).first\(\)]; db.session.commit\(\); print\('DB ready'\); print\('Players:', [p.name for p in Player.query.all\(\)]\); print\('Games:', [g.name for g in Game.query.all\(\)]\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Flask app skeleton for laggeros ranking *)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create laggeros --public --source=. --description "Ranking de cuanto laggean los integrantes del grupo capos en sus partidas" --push)
